name: Fuxing China Group Limited
summary: Fuxing China Group Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and markets zipper products in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Zippers, Processing, and Trading segments. It offers zipper chains and sliders; provides processing services, such as color dyeing of fabric tapes for zippers, and electroplating services for zipper sliders; manufactures and sells dyed yarns; and trades in raw materials, including rubber threads, nylon fabrics, and nylon yarn. The company is also involved in the real estate development activities. Fuxing China Group Limited sells its zipper products primarily to manufacturers of apparels, shoes, bags, and camping equipment. The company also exports its zipper products to Australia, the European Union, Russia, Turkey, Korea, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, and other countries. Fuxing China Group Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Jinjiang, the People's Republic of China.
